# Q10 comp count distinct + values + filter + sort (lateral hunt) (lateral movement rdp)

**Dataset**: `gx_06_rdp` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

RDP lateral-movement hunting — remote-desktop connection patterns across hosts. Q10 comp count distinct + values + filter + sort (lateral hunt). `count_distinct()` is the distinct-count (never `dcount`).

```sql
dataset = gx_06_rdp | comp count_distinct(dst_host) as distinct_dst, count(dst_host) as total_sessions, values(dst_host) as dst_hosts by user | filter distinct_dst >= 3 | fields user, distinct_dst, total_sessions, dst_hosts | sort desc distinct_dst
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 2). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
